arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Look to get Revenge Against Barcelona in UCL Quarterfinal
arts.sum: The Champions League is back and Borussia Dortmund are on the road against one of Europe’s best teams: FC Barcelona . With Schlotterbeck out for the season, Borussia Dortmund’s backline will have to step up if they wish to keep one of Europe’s best players quiet.

arts.ttl: Guirassy hoping for ‘goal-fest’ as Dortmund take on Barca
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund star Serhou Guirassy is hoping for a “goal-fest” when his side take on Barcelona in the quarter-finals of the Champions League . “It is of course great to score against Barcelona – they are one of the top 10 teams in the world.

arts.ttl: New addition to Barcelona’s tested line-up to face Dortmund

This has given a reason to believe for their coach, Niko Kovac, who stated "We haven't just come to play, we'll try to leave with a good result". Both teams attended the press today, with coach Niko Kovac and player Waldemar Anton representing the German side.

arts.ttl: Neymar Junior gives verdict on former club Barcelona’s Champions League chances
arts.sum: Barcelona are one of favourites to win the Champions League this season, although their primary focus for now is to get past Borussia Dortmund, whom they face in their quarter-final tie over the next seven days. arts.ttl: Gavi reveals the swear word Flick has already learned at Barca
arts.sum: The two have already appeared at today’s pre-match press conference, but Gavi has also spoken to Movistar where he’s been asked about his manager’s language skills. It was put to Gavi that people often learn swear words first when they are trying a new language.

arts.ttl: Paris Saint-Germain starlet reacts to Lamine Yamal comparisons
arts.sum: Last summer, Barcelona opted to sign Dani Olmo, and in the process, they turned down the chance to sign a now-PSG star that is generating a lot of conversations in France after a fine debut season at the Ligue 1 champions. arts.ttl: ‘You don’t have a f**king clue’ – Barcelona star fires back at critics
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has on Tuesday made use of the opportunity to send an unerring message to his many critics. Midfielder Gavi is for his part fresh off his finest…

arts.ttl: Dortmund boss sets timeframe for Schlotterbeck's recovery: "A shock for us"
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund sporting director Sebastian Kehl has revealed that Nico Schlotterbeck is expected to be sidelined for half a year.
